gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/369)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/369)
text: بَيْنَا نَحْنُ قُعُودٌ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذْ مَرَّ رَجُلٌ بِيَدِهِ خُطَّافٌ مَذْبُوحٌ فَوَثَبَ إِلَيْهِ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) حَتَّى أَخَذَهُ مِنْ يَدِهِ ثُمَّ دَحَا بِهِ الْأَرْضَ فَقَالَ ( عليه السلام ) أَ عَالِمُكُمْ أَمَرَكُمْ بِهَذَا أَمْ فَقِيهُكُمْ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبِي عَنْ جَدِّي أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) نَهَى عَنْ قَتْلِ السِّتَّةِ مِنْهَا الْخُطَّافُ

وَ قَالَ إِنَّ دَوَرَانَهُ فِي السَّمَاءِ أَسَفاً لِمَا فُعِلَ بِأَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ تَسْبِيحَهُ قِرَاءَةُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعالَمِينَ أَ لَا تَرَوْنَهُ يَقُولُ وَ لَا الضَّالِّينَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from Ibrahim Bin Is’haq, from Ali Bin Muhammad, raising it to Dawood Al Raqqy, or someone else who said,

‘While we were seated in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, when a man passed by in whose hand was a slaughtered swallow. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> leapt over to him until he<sup>asws</sup> seized it from his hand, then levelled the ground with it, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Has your scholar or your jurist ordered you with this? My<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> informed me<sup>asws</sup> that my<sup>asws</sup> grandfather<sup>saww</sup> Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> forbade from killing the six, from these was the swallow’.

And heasws said: ‘It encircling in the sky is (its expression of) regret at what was done with the Peopleasws of the Household of Muhammadsaww, and its Glorification is its recitation of ‘The Praise is for Allahazwj the Lordazwj of the Worlds’. Are you not seeing it saying (chirping) ‘Wa la Zalleeen (and not those who go astray)’?’
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ibrahim ibn Ishaq from Ali ibn Muhammad in a marfu ‘ manner from Dawud al- Riqqiy or others who has said the following: “As we were sitting with abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, a man passed by with a slaughtered khuttaf in his hand. Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, quickly got up, took it from his hand and threw it away saying, ’Has your scholar or your faqih commanded you to kill it? My father narrated to me from my grandfather that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, prohibited killing of six things of which one is al- khuttaf. Its roaming in the sky is in regret for what is done to the family of Muhammad, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, and its reading Tasbih (Allah is free of all defects) is its reciting, “All praise belongs to Allah, Cherisher of the worlds.” Have you not noticed that it says, “Waladdallin (and who are not straying)?” (the last word in Chapter 1 of the Quran)’
